name: Whole Fish Baked in Salt Crust
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole fish such as snapper, bream, sea bass
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F.
2. Clean and gut the fish, removing the top and bottom fins, scales, and gills.
3. Whisk egg whites until they reach soft peaks. Fold in salt until combined.
4. Place thyme inside the body cavity of the fish.
5. Spread 4 tablespoons of egg white mixture onto a large platter suitable for oven-to-table use.
6. Place the fish on top of the egg white mixture.
7. Spoon the remaining egg white mixture over the top of the fish.
8. Place the fish and platter in the preheated oven and bake for 25 to 30 minutes.
9. Turn off the heat source.
10. Carefully remove the baked fish from the platter, cracking the crust slightly.
11. Gently separate the salt crust from the top of the fish.
12. Divide the flesh among two plates.
13. Serve with extra virgin olive oil and lemon wedges.
(An excellent accompaniment would be an arugula and tomato salad.)
Yield: 4 servings
